models.title: Qwen3 Coder
models.description: Large context window, strong code understanding

customCommands.name: Explain Code
customCommands.description: Explain what the selected code does
customCommands.prompt:
Explain this code in detail, including:
1. What it does
2. How it works
3. Key concepts involved
4. Potential improvements

Code: {input}

customCommands.name: Refactor Code
customCommands.description: Refactor and improve the selected code
customCommands.prompt:
Refactor this code to improve:
1. Readability
2. Performance
3. Maintainability
4. Best practices

Provide the refactored code with explanations.

Code: {input}

customCommands.name: Add Tests
customCommands.description: Add unit tests for the selected code
customCommands.prompt:
Write comprehensive unit tests for this code. Include:
1. Happy path tests
2. Edge cases
3. Error handling
4. Mock dependencies if needed

Code: {input}

customCommands.name: Fix Bugs
customCommands.description: Identify and fix bugs in the selected code
customCommands.prompt:
Analyze this code for potential bugs and issues. Provide:
1. List of identified problems
2. Root cause analysis
3. Fixed code with explanations

Code: {input}

systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI coding assistant. You provide clear, accurate, and well-explained code solutions. Always consider best practices, security, and maintainability. When providing code, include relevant explanations and context.
